description:
2026 Porsche 911 Turbo S, 3.6L F6, AWD, 701bhp, 7 Speed Automatic AED 1,499,000 or AED 23,484 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 23 KMs - Porsche Warranty Valid Until June 2031 - Brand New - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Oak Green Metallic Neo - Leather Interior in Black - 20/21” Turbo S Wheels - Adaptive Sports Seats Plus – Electrical 18 Ways with Memory Package - Rear Seats - Seat Ventilation - Side Skirts Painted in Exterior Colour - Exterior Mirror Upper Trims in Carbon - Side Window Trims Painted in Black (High-Gloss) - Exclusive Design Fuel Filler Cap - Sport Design Rear Apron Painted in Black (High-Gloss) - Electric Slide/Tilt Glass Sunroof - PASM Sport Suspension (-10mm) - Lifting System Front Axle - Sport Tailpipes in Titanium - Porsche Ceramic Composite Brake (PCCB) eith Brake Calipers Painted in Black (High-Gloss) - HD-Matrix LED Main Headlights - Exclusive Design Taillights - ‘PORSCHE’ Logo LED Door Courtesy Lights - Interior Trim Package with Decorative Stitching and Seat Accents in Contrasting Colour - Leather Package 930 - Interior Package Painted in Exterior Colour with Accent in Black - Seat Belts in Black - Belt Outlet Trims in Race-Tex - Sports Seats Plus Backrests Leather with Decorative Inlay in Exterior Colour - Heated GT Sports Steering Wheel Race-Tex with Steering Wheel Panel Carbon Matt - PDK Gear Selector in Aluminium - Cup-Holder Trim Leather - ‘PORSCHE’ Logo on Storage Compartment Lid Race-Tex - Sun Visors Leather - Interior Mirror Panel Leather with Coloured Decorative Stitching - Pedals and Footrest in Aluminium - Inner Door Sill Guards Leather with Coloured Decorative Stitching - Passenger Footwell Storage Net
